title: AI Resume Builder — How to Automate Job Applications & Resume Writing
summary: Jobright is an AI resume builder platform with 2M+ users that automates job application workflows including resume tailoring, role matching, cover letter generation, and application autofilling via Chrome extension. The platform integrates AI career coaching and insider referral matching to streamline the job search process.
writeup: This video walks through Jobright, an AI resume builder with more than 2 million users that automates job search workflows. Coverage includes resume tailoring, role matching, cover letter generation, and application autofilling through a Chrome extension. It also notes the platform's AI career coaching and insider referral matching features. The throughline is consolidating the application process into one tool rather than handling each step separately.
